arts.ttl: Napoli aim for five star summer market to convince coach Antonio Conte: Partenopei earmark Garnacho and Sudakov
arts.sum: Following the Partenopei’s disappointing winter transfer window in which the Azzurri failed to adequately replace star-winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, which may arguably be a decisive factor that could ultimately cost them…

arts.ttl: Man Utd NEED to sign Tyler Dibling: 'Most talented player I've ever seen'
arts.sum: Man Utd NEED to sign Tyler Dibling: 'Most talented player I've ever seen' Physically, the stuff I've seen him [Dibling] do at 18 in the Premier League of people just bouncing off him, being put on the floor when he dribbles the ball, he has something I've not seen in a British player in a long time.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Lyon - Europa League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up for their Europa League quarter-final first leg with Lyon on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal win Gyokeres race with sensational contract offer: Chelsea and Man Utd beaten
arts.sum: FootballTransfers has previously detailed that Arsenal have put themselves to the front of the race for Athletic Club winger Nico Williams thanks to their strong financial advantage, and they are set to put this muscle to good use in order to land the Sporting CP striker. Gyokeres is set to be offered a bumper deal worth around €60 million (£50m) over five years, according to Just Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim tells Kobbie Mainoo three things he must improve at Man Utd
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo has enjoyed a meteoric rise over the past 18 months but Ruben Amorim believes the Manchester United youngster still has plenty of improvement to do

arts.ttl: Man United icon Roy Keane's future son-in-law 'heartbroken' as huge disappointment confirmed
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Robert Hynes, Steven Crawford, Isaac Seelochan)
arts.sum: Southampton's Taylor Harwood-Bellis took to social media to share his devastation after the Saints were relegated from the Premier League following defeat at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fan arrested for alleged slap on Jack Grealish BANNED from Old Trafford
arts.sum: Greater Manchester Police confirmed the arrest of an individual for assault after an alleged slap on Jack Grealish as the Manchester City star left the pitch at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Manchester United have to be careful with Kobbie Mainoo
arts.sum: The homegrown 19-year-old has been absent since picking up a muscular issue in training in February.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd Consider Signing Jean-Philippe Mateta Instead of Delap
arts.sum: Manchester United have decided to earmark Jean-Philippe Mateta as a back-up option to Liam Delap as they go in search of firepower

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim responds to Gary Neville's 'robotic' Manchester derby blasting - as Man United boss admits he changed his mind on the verdict
arts.sum: Manchester City and United played out what has been regarded as one of the worst games of the season as they drew 0-0 at Old Trafford - a result that did neither team's season any favours.
